item.title: Shell
item.description: A gateway to controlling the system

item.title: Backpressure
item.description: Tell producers to stop sending data because the consumer cannot keep up

item.title: Daemons
item.description: Service processes that run in the background and supervise the system or provide functionality to other processes

item.title: man
item.description: Command to get detailed documentation of different unix components, including other cmds.

item.title: Memory leaks
item.description: Improper managing of memory by a computer program

item.title: Pipes
item.description: Connect cmd outputs to cmd inputs to create complex pipelines

item.title: The c programming language
item.description: A key programming language in the creation of Unix
